name: tavily-search
description: 使用Tavily API进行网络搜索，获取实时信息、回答问题或研究主题
capabilities: Query Tavily API for web search results
Filter and rank search results by relevance
Extract key snippets and metadata from pages
Handle API errors and rate limits gracefully
Support custom search parameters and domains
author: CK991357
securitySummary: This skill consists only of documentation files (SKILL.md, skill-report.json) describing the Tavily web search API. No executable code exists in the package. The static scanner misinterpreted JSON code blocks in documentation as shell commands and misidentified metadata fields as cryptographic patterns. All findings are false positives from documentation parsing errors.
valueStatement: Get current information beyond AI training data. Access live web results with intelligent query optimization and source verification.
userTitle: Search the web with real-time results
limitations: Rate limited by Tavily service tiers
Cannot access paywalled or private content
Search results depend on Tavily's index coverage

useCases.title: Academic research with sources
useCases.description: Find recent papers, articles, and credible sources for research projects with automatic citation formatting.

useCases.title: Technical documentation search
useCases.description: Get latest API docs, library updates, and coding examples from official sources and community forums.

useCases.title: Market and news monitoring
useCases.description: Track industry news, competitor updates, and market trends with real-time web monitoring.

promptTemplates.title: Basic search
promptTemplates.prompt: Search for: [your question]. Provide 3-5 relevant results with brief summaries.

promptTemplates.title: Research compilation
promptTemplates.prompt: Research [topic] and compile findings from multiple sources. Include recent developments and key statistics.

promptTemplates.title: Technical lookup
promptTemplates.prompt: Find the official documentation for [technology/feature]. Include code examples and best practices.

promptTemplates.title: Comparative analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Compare [option A] vs [option B] based on recent reviews and feature updates. Create a comparison table.

bestPractices: Use specific keywords and phrases for better search results
Specify date ranges when looking for recent information
Combine multiple searches for comprehensive topic coverage
antiPatterns: Searching for personal or sensitive information
Relying on single source without verification
Using without proper API key configuration

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: Works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Integrates seamlessly through standard protocols.

faq.question: Are there search limits?
faq.answer: Limited by your Tavily API plan. Free tier includes 100 queries monthly. Paid plans offer more.

faq.question: How do I integrate with my workflow?
faq.answer: Configure Tavily API key in your AI tool settings. Use natural language to request searches.

faq.question: Is my search data secure?
faq.answer: Searches go directly to Tavily API. No data is stored or logged by this skill.

faq.question: Why am I getting no results?
faq.answer: Check API key configuration and query format. Very specific or recent topics may have limited results.

faq.question: How does this compare to built-in search?
faq.answer: Provides real-time web results versus static training data. Better for current events and recent developments.
